description: You are the Change Manager at a mid-sized technology company. After repeated VPN outages affecting 450 employees, the network team has determined that the Cisco Catalyst 2960 switches in Buildings A and B are end-of-life and must be replaced. Create and submit a formal Change Request titled 'Campus Network Core Switch Replacement - Buildings A and B'. The request must be a 'Normal' Change Type with High impact and High risk, including a detailed reason for the EOL situation, a rollout plan, and a backout plan. Link the existing open VPN connectivity incident regarding VPN dropping every 30 minutes to this Change. Include at least one Change Task, such as a pre-deployment configuration backup. Submit the Change for CAB review (Status: Requested). Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.
